nodes.name: Local File Trigger
nodes.notes: Production V1 keeps this workflow inactive and uses manual n8n runs. Only activate this trigger after validating raw/** watcher behavior.

nodes.name: Run plan-source-note.ts
nodes.notes: Deterministic baseline planner: creates only the source note and root index update. Additional LLM plans are proposed later and require approval.

nodes.name: Build OpenRouter Ingest Plan Request
nodes.notes: Produces an optional richer ingest Mutation Plan for manual review. It is not applied by this workflow.
